title: An Act to Create Consistency in Retirement Service Benefits Deferral Under the Maine Public Employees Retirement System
last_house_action: 3/20/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/20/2025 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Received by the Secretary of the Senate on January 16, 2025 and REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2
Report READ and ACCEPTED . READ ONCE Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.
CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
